title: citrosma guianensis
intro: Citrosma guianensis, also known as the Lemon Flower, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Citrosma guianensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
